abort.must_enable_2fa: Two-factor authentication must be enabled in order to log in with this provider.
abort.no_otp_options: No valid multi-factor authentication methods were found for this account.
abort.otp_method_lost: The selected verification method is no longer valid. Please try again.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Alarm.com. Please check your network.
error.invalid_otp: Invalid one-time password. Please check your code and try again.
error.invalid_otp_method: The selected delivery method is not supported.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check logs for details.

otp_select_method.title: Verification Method
otp_select_method.description: Alarm.com requires a security code. How should we send it?

otp_submit.title: Verify Your Identity
otp_submit.description: Please enter the one-time code sent to your chosen device.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Integration
reauth_confirm.description: Your session with Alarm.com has expired. Please sign in again to restore access.

data_description.arm_code: The code used for arming/disarming and locking/unlocking. Leave blank if not required by your panel.
data_description.remove_arm_code: Check this box and save to clear your existing saved security code.

modes.title: Arming Profiles
modes.description: Customize how each arming mode behaves in Home Assistant.

data_description.arm_night_options: Note: Night mode is only compatible with specific Alarm.com partitions.
